title: Marinara Trattoria
description: Italian comfort food in a casual trattoria with checkered tablecloths and a mural depicting Venice.

title: Grappino Ristorante Trattoria
description: Traditional Italian dishes and specials in an informal room hung with movie posters and chalkboards.

title: Hope and Anchor
description: Comfortable restaurant offering classic fish & chips, plus heaping burgers & sandwiches.

title: Elementi Restaurant
description: Low-key eatery for classic Italian fare, like pasta & pizza, made with locally sourced ingredients.

title: NAÏM
description: Stylish restaurant serving reimagined, traditional flavours from the Mediterranean & Middle East.
